entity.summary: Mexico-launched Latin American cryptocurrency exchange that began operating in 2020 under the Mexo name and rebranded to TruBit Pro on October 3, 2022.
entity.notes: Official TruBit material identifies 2020 as the start of the service under the Mexo name and October 3, 2022 as the TruBit Pro rebrand date. The public material does not fully resolve the legal-entity structure across Latin America, so confidence remains medium.

expected.summary: Mexico-based centralized exchange launched in 2020 and still operating under the Trubit brand.

changes.summary: Mexico-launched Latin American cryptocurrency exchange that began operating in 2020 under the Mexo name and rebranded to TruBit Pro on October 3, 2022.
changes.notes: Official TruBit material identifies 2020 as the start of the service under the Mexo name and October 3, 2022 as the TruBit Pro rebrand date. The public material does not fully resolve the legal-entity structure across Latin America, so confidence remains medium.

events.title: Mexo began operating in Mexico
events.description: The exchange lineage later known as TruBit Pro began operating in Mexico in 2020 under the Mexo name.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Mexo rebranded to TruBit Pro
events.description: Mexo changed its exchange brand to TruBit Pro as part of a broader TruBit product consolidation for Latin America.
events.notes: Official TruBit material identifies October 3, 2022 as the effective rebrand date.

evidence.title: About TruBit
evidence.notes: Official company history states that the service began in 2020 under the Mexo name.

evidence.title: Is TruBit reliable?
evidence.notes: Official educational material also places the service start in 2020 under the Mexo identity.

evidence.title: Rebranding FAQs TruBit Pro
evidence.notes: Official FAQ explains the Mexo-to-TruBit Pro rebrand.

evidence.title: Mexo will become TruBit Pro from October 3, 2022
evidence.notes: Official announcement gives the effective rebrand date.

evidence.title: TruBit official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current TruBit brand and active platform.
